# Chapter 15: Climate, ecological, planetary failure  (~100 pp)
- 15.1 Engineering as ecological actor (15) · 15.2 Pollution as engineered byproduct (15) · 15.3 Climate change engineering-first (18) · 15.4 Tipping points and irreversibility (15) · 15.5 Engineering responses to ecological failure (15) · 15.6 Failure section (case): the ozone-layer near-miss (and the success), CFC industry, lead in petrol, PFAS (22)

**Archetype**: failure, ethics, scaling. **Project**: assess one product's environmental footprint with primary data. **Exercises**: 20.
